use_cases: Displaying individual products in e-commerce catalogs and marketplaces
Showing featured or highlighted items with status badges
Product comparison grids in SaaS applications
New arrival or promotional product highlights
Compact product previews in shopping cart previews
ai_summary: A product card component featuring a badge variant system for highlighting product information like status, category, or labels. Built with Tailwind CSS and class-variance-authority for consistent styling. The card includes hover interactions on badge elements and follows a clean, minimalist visual approach suitable for modern e-commerce and SaaS product displays.
